text.tspan: (framework: Spring Boot, Micronaut, Quarkus, Go-Kit, NestJS, etc.)
RESULT: A new service starts with ~50 lines of business code
and inherits hundreds of lines of production-grade cross-cutting concerns.
WHEN A NEW METRIC, LOG FIELD, OR TRACE PROPAGATION IS NEEDED:
u2022 add to the chassis once
u2022 every service that bumps the chassis version gets it
u2022 NO change needed in business code
DOWNSIDE: chassis ties services to a single platform/language.
Multi-language orgs often switch to the SERVICE MESH model
